positive: A celestial jungle scene rendered in a detailed linocut woodcut style. The central motif is a stylized, bioluminescent fox sitting amidst giant, curling tropical leaves and delicate ferns. Incorporate glowing geometric celestial patterns (stars, moons, constellations) woven into the foliage. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, forest emerald green, burnt orange, and stark white highlights. The composition must be centrally balanced, featuring clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast. Focus on intricate patterns and visible textural details like etching and wood grain. Print-ready, vector-style quality, highly scalable.
